title: Gunjaaish
desc: A heartfelt journey of a couple raising a child with autism, discovering the power of love, resilience, and community. Featuring autistic actors, this ground breaking film celebrates acceptance and the beauty of being different.

title: Doughnut
desc: Sameer, on his afternoon break from work, walks into a restaurant hoping for some quiet time. However, a doughnut with supposedly magical properties has him in for a shock. Fearing the unreal powers he suddenly acquires, he hurries out. How does a young woman who walks in right then change Sameer's attitude towards the magical doughnut?

title: Faatima
desc: Faatima is a story of two unknown individuals who meet each other for the first time at a cafe and share with each other some very interesting facts only to make us realize that good souls do exist.

title: Firki
desc: It's the way many father's typically behave when their children start driving. The idea of using the navigation tool to highlight the generation gap is also based on my own life experience. The title is Firki because the family is spinning around like a Firki without having reached their destination in the film. It's also depicts how they've been taken for a ride by the navigation app, or as we say in Hindi....Firki le li

title: Faboo
desc: Are we using social media to expand our horizon or are we overusing it and unknowingly desensitizing ourselves. Faboo explores this aspect of social media and nudges us to think about it through this story of a mother and son.

title: Dhoop Haskar Boli
desc: A determined daughter walks into a matrimonial office with her quiet, circumspect mother. What follows next is an awkward conversation with a charming executive and an inward journey for all three.

title: First Sin
desc: What would you do if you unexpectedly obtain magical powers? Ashwath, a failed businessman is having a troubled relationship with his wife . One fine morning he gets a Sand-timer at his door steps. Life takes a turn when he discovers magical powers in it. Will the Sand-timer be a boon or curse ?

title: Fear Of Wheels
desc: This film beautifully captures the emotional interplay between the vibrant, ambitious youth and the helpless, world-weary elders, showcasing the poignant struggle between generations. As a person reaches a certain stage in life, they observe numerous things happening around them, yet feel incapable of taking action. Over time, they become reliant on others even for the most basic tasks. This narrative portrays those individuals who experience old age gradually tightening its grip around them.

title: Double Blind
desc: A Rendezvous of childhood friends takes place in a dark alley of Mumbai, among the chaos and hustle of the city that never sleeps.

title: Damdi
desc: Damdi, is a story of a young boy. Whose parents left him in childhood, was pampered by her grandmother by working as a babysitter. Damdi has grown up and works in a garage, also studying together. A dear friend Paltan keeps warning him against good and evil. A garage owner Lallan bhaiya acts as a guide. Damdi is in love with a girl Gunja. He has an addiction and attraction towards intoxication, becoming the heart's weakness. Heartbreaks and despairs but returns to a new direction in life again.

title: Destiny's Two
desc: Mohan and his dwarf wife have come to Mumbai from Gujarat for his work. They are a newly wed couple. Their marriage is a compromise, as they do not see the spouse of their imagination in each other. Mohan who gets fascinated seeing taller women realizes the same about his wife. He decides to go to a red light area to fulfill his desire. But does he do it?

title: Chup Chap
desc: Following a newlywed couple enjoying a robust and empathetic bond, their world takes a turn during a party with friends, sparking a profound shift in their perspectives. Despite their differing opinions, both stand firm in their convictions. When an issue deeply troubles the wife, she bravely advocates for justice. After a prolonged battle, legal verdict is achieved. Yet, uncertainties linger about the truth behind this justice, leaving the tale shrouded in ambiguity.

title: Game Of Caste
desc: Game of Caste centers on Rakesh, an ordinary man visiting his aunt in her native village. He's initially captivated by the village's beauty but soon confronts a harsh reality: the mistreatment of a lower-caste boy by the villagers. This revelation shocks him, leading to his determined fight for the boy's rights. The overarching question remains: can he succeed in this battle between humanity and caste discrimination?

title: Days Left Behind
desc: A man struggles to survive in a post-apocalyptic India where the World has been devastated by a deadly virus that turns people into wild cannibalistic creatures, until one day he comes across an abandoned car.

title: Expectations
desc: The story is about a boy grappling with overwhelming feelings and contemplating drastic measures. This growing issue among the younger generation stems from unfulfilled expectations placed by society. 'Expectations' is a short film exploring the theme of emotional struggles and their severe consequences.

title: Perks Of Being An Actor
desc: A relentless pursuit of an aging actor to become a HERO and how these struggles land him in awkward situations.

title: Dum Dum Deega Deega
desc: The solution to your problem is often hidden in the problem itself; all you need is a different outlook. The story of a beggar child, Ajju, who lives on the streets of Mumbai, but dreams big. He challenges his unfortunate fate, with nothing but a 'different outlook' towards the situation he faces.

title: Dhadkan
desc: Even in this modern era, there are several religious conflicts around us. We start judging a stranger based on his/her religion or culture. This short film is a humble attempt trying to reduce the distance between religions and thereby portraying religious bondage.

title: Cheepatakadumpa
desc: ‘CHEEPATAKADUMPA’ follows three women over less than a day as they awaken their naughty teenage alter egos when they meet again after years, unleashing mischief on each other, and in turn on the biased patriarchal belief systems of the world they were born into. In a masculine culture that is unduly serious about making the rules that women are expected to live by, Teja, Santo and Tamanna find true and happy rebellion in the gasping throes of this mischief.

title: Date Night
desc: A meticulously planned date night goes terribly wrong when the husband reveals that he will not be able to make it.

title: Faith
desc: This Young Couple is Super Excited as they just got the permission to go on a night out together but things take an unexpected turn as they get abducted in the middle of the night. The Goons are Brutal on them and it seems that there is no way out until the protagonist thinks of a supernatural idea.

title: Dry Dreams
desc: We mostly don’t care about things, which we have around us and are easily available here’s one such thrilling short film about a guy who has two visitors asking for water, what happens next is an eye opener.

title: Dadi Ka Murabba
desc: Ramesh dreams of a good job but his lack of fluent English hinders him. His Dadi advises him to be self-reliant, prompting him to sell murabba with her help. His business grows, and he asked to raise the flag at his old school on Independence Day. The sarpanch tells him that as a self-reliant young individual, Ramesh can add to the nation's growth. The film shows that it takes both an individual's grit and determination and the support of loved ones to achieve the impossible.

title: Firefly
desc: A chance encounter with a piece from his past, leads Ved, a young man to reminisce a fateful night with his girlfriend, Daaria.

title: Dawn To Dusk
desc: Dawn to Dusk tells the narrative of Nisha Rawat, a young girl who lost her parents. She has skin cancer, Malignant Melanoma and her entire life revolves around the night. Nisha accepted her circumstances as they were. Her life, however, is turned upside down when she meets Suraj, a boy who works at a hospital. Dawn to Dusk becomes Nisha and Suraj's narrative.

title: Dhongbaaz
desc: Upon learning about his bride's unfaithfulness, an anguished groom delves into her past to uncover the truth, all while the wedding guests impatiently await his return.

title: Goals
desc: As Meera, our pretty in pink protagonist comes back to Bombay after spending several months apart from her beau Ranbir, the circumstances force them to evaluate the basis of their relationship. This film is a deep dive into a young adult's core problems of emotional dishonesty and preference of style over substance.
